generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing‑angle encoder mounted on the hoist measuring pendulum angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetryStream
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer mounted on the hoist measuring wind speed impacting crane dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetryStream
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance ElectromagnetStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor reporting the on/off state of the crane’s electromagnet"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneTelemetryStream
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance CraneTelemetryStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoderSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ElectromagnetStatusSensor
]

instance CraneTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Telemetry stream containing motor encoder readings, swing angle, wind speed, electromagnet status, and timestamps"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneTelemetryStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabaseEnabler
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the lab‑scale gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibModuleEnabler
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance KinematicTrajectoryPlannerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used by the trajectory generator to plan optimal paths"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorModuleEnabler
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Combined electrical‑mechanical simulation model of the crane and its controllers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibModuleEnabler
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance TimescaleDBSchemaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB schema defining tables for telemetry stream storage"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabaseEnabler
    base:isContainedIn LabScaleGantryEnvironment
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval controller driving the stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671‑Eval controller driving the stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance for time‑series storage of telemetry streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker publishing telemetry streams and signaling between services"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTSignalingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards visualizing real‑time telemetry and validation alerts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorModuleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib for generating optimal crane trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib for simulating crane dynamics and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
]

instance ContinuousValidationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module gantrylib performing continuous validation of telemetry against distance thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OperatorHMIEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Operator HMI enabling real‑time status display and payload handling commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorHMIService
]

instance GantryLibModuleEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library gantrylib integrating CAD, kinematic, simulation models, telemetry, and motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneSimulationService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service logging telemetry data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides TelemetryLoggingInsight
]

instance MQTTSignalingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling MQTT signaling between internal services"
    DTDFVocab:provides MQTTSignalInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service visualizing telemetry and alerts via Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal crane trajectories for payload transport"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalPathInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating crane dynamics for performance analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterTuningInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service conducting continuous validation of telemetry against distance metrics and thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultClassificationInsight
]

instance OperatorHMIService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing operator HMI for real‑time status and payload handling decisions" // TODO: Fix the error on this line using the following error message: 'Couldn't resolve reference to Entity 'DTDFvocab:Service'.'
    DTDFVocab:provides PayloadHandlingDecisionInsight
]

instance TelemetryLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight confirming successful logging of telemetry data into TimescaleDB"
]

instance ValidationAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated by continuous validation when telemetry deviates from expected thresholds"
]

instance OptimalPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggestion of optimal crane trajectory to move payload efficiently"
]

instance ParameterTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting parameter adjustments based on simulation results"
]

instance PayloadHandlingDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time decision support for payload handling provided by the operator HMI"
]

instance FaultClassificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating fault type based on anomaly detection in telemetry"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of real‑time telemetry and system status via Grafana dashboards"
]

instance MQTTSignalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful MQTT signal routing between services"
]

instance LabScaleGantryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CartMotorController
    base:contains HoistMotorController
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoderSensor
    base:contains AnemometerSensor
    base:contains ElectromagnetStatusSensor
    base:contains TimescaleDBDatabaseEnabler
    base:contains MosquittoMQTTBrokerEnabler
    base:contains GrafanaDashboardEnabler
    base:contains TrajectoryGeneratorModuleEnabler
    base:contains SimulationEngineEnabler
    base:contains ContinuousValidationEngineEnabler
    base:contains OperatorHMIEnabler
    base:contains GantryLibModuleEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory Generator Service creates optimal movement trajectories and publishes motor command sequences to the Physical Crane Interface, which forwards them to the cart and hoist motor controllers; continuous validation and simulation services may send feedback via MQTT."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous operation: telemetry sampled and logged at sub‑second cadence; trajectory generation, simulation, and validation performed on‑the‑fly in sync with physical motion; services operate continuously while the system runs."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Cyber‑physical architecture where the physical gantry crane (motors, controllers, sensors) interacts with a digital twin consisting of a Database, MQTT broker, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, Dashboard, and operator HMI, orchestrated via Docker containers and Python modules; all components communicate over MQTT and SQL."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Digital twin models the crane throughout design (CAD, kinematic model), manufacturing (actual assembly), and operation (real‑time monitoring, control, validation); continuous validation and fault detection cover the operated phase, while simulation and trajectory services support the design phase."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Trajectory generator uses analytical kinematic model to create swing‑free trajectories; continuous validation service computes Euclidean distance between executed and simulated trajectories, comparing against user‑defined threshold; alerts trigger when deviation exceeds threshold, allowing fault detection; model verification through comparison with simulation and empirical data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑digital data transferred via USB/serial from Arduino to Python interface, published over MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) to services; services communicate over local network via MQTT; database accessed via PostgreSQL interface; visual dashboards connect to TimescaleDB via Grafana’s data source; all processes run on a single PC host."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital twin is containerized using Docker; Docker‑compose orchestrates six containers (TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTT broker, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation); all run locally on the same machine that hosts the physical crane; repository includes docker compose file, initial‑setup scripts, and documentation in MkDocs; licensed under MIT."
]
